blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,489 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
